common/repository/src/main/java/org/hpcc.general_idea: Replace legacy List.add(int index, E element) with the new List.addFirst(E element) method introduced in Java 21.

kube-provisioner/src/main/java/org/hpccl.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for Java 21 compatibility.
kube-provisioner/src/main/java/org/hpccl.why_exists: List.get(0) is deprecated for removal in Java 21; using it may cause compile-time deprecation warnings or errors depending on compiler settings, and List.getFirst() is the preferred API.

object-controller/src/main/java/org/hpcc.why_exists: List.get(0) is deprecated for removal in Java 21; while it still compiles, the migration recipe enforces the new API to avoid future breakage and deprecation warnings.
